email.subject: Re: checking in
email.text:
Agreed on point 2. Pushing back on point 3 — we already have vendor lock-in concerns.

> On Jan 6, 2025, at 10:14 AM, Bob <bob@sdr-jarvis.dev> wrote:
>
> Three quick points:
> 1. Pricing is flexible
> 2. We integrate with Salesforce
> 3. You can self-host for enterprise
>
>> On Jan 5, 2025, at 9:00 AM, Priya <priya@stellar.ai> wrote:
>>
>> Can you give me the short version?
